note: LIVE-data manifest for lean-6module-v1.1 freshness gate. Every LIVE field carries >=2 independent sources fetched at as_of; verify_freshness.py cross-checks these against an independent Yahoo re-fetch and the decision_card value. FILED data (10-K/10-Q line items) is NOT here -- it rides the dated-source claim_ledger discipline. IMPORTANT INCIDENT NOTE (self-caught, INC-001-style near-miss): one intermediate web-search summarization during this run returned a conflicting price ($102.90 / mkt cap $101.38B, apparently a search-engine artifact possibly confusing MDT with another ticker or a stale cached snippet -- it also referenced an unrelated 'cyberattack' claim not corroborated anywhere else). This was NOT accepted -- a direct WebFetch re-pull of stockanalysis.com's MDT page returned an exact, timestamped confirmation ($83.19 at Jul 2, 2026, 4:00 PM EDT, mkt cap $106.49B, 52wk range $73.31-$106.33) matching every other independent source gathered this run. The conflicting figure was investigated and rejected, not silently discarded -- documented here per the verify-data-before-trusting discipline.

live_fields.value: FY2027 organic revenue growth guidance +6.75% to +7.25%; non-GAAP diluted EPS guidance $5.90-$6.00 (+6.7% to +8.5% YoY), issued with the Q4/full-year FY2026 earnings release.

China ~7% of total revenue (FY2024-vintage figure, NOT independently re-confirmed for FY2026 -- flagged as a material OPEN item, facts.md O2). Direct tariff exposure to Chinese imports specifically <1% of revenue. CEO characterization (unquoted/undated): China VBP pricing-pressure impact is 'largely behind us,' with China sales 'growing at the corporate average' as procedure-volume gains offset residual pricing pressure. This is directionally OPPOSITE of a comparable prior GEHC-exemplar finding (confirmed -15% YoY China revenue decline), but rests on meaningfully weaker sourcing -- no hard, current-year percentage or dated management quote was found and independently verified this run.
live_fields.confidence_note: LOWER confidence than a typical LIVE-qualitative field in this framework -- explicitly flagged in facts.md O2 as the top-priority gap to close on next refresh, rather than treated as a fully resolved data point.

live_fields.value: Hugo RAS system received first US FDA clearance December 3, 2025 for urologic procedures (prostatectomy, nephrectomy, cystectomy), based on the 137-patient Expand URO IDE study (both primary safety/effectiveness endpoints met), subsequently peer-reviewed in BJU International (2026). General surgery and gynecology indications in pipeline (Embrace Gynecology enrollment complete). Zero commercial revenue/scale disclosure found anywhere as of as_of date.
